license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.jkackse
title: Zika Virus propagation
author: Elen Mello de Souza

steps_raw.instruction: wash 3 times the monolayer of C6/36 lineage cells seeded at the culture flask with Phosphate-buffered saline (PBSx1).
inoculation with 100 µl of the viral suspension at the multiplicity of infection (MOI) 0, 01 for 1h / 37°C to allow for virus adsorption, under agitation every 15 minutes.

maintain with 5 ml of the Leibovitz L-15 supplemented medium (Cultilab) with 2% fetal bovine serum (Cultilab), 2 mM L-glutamine (Gibco) and 100U/50µg penicillin/streptomycin (Sigma-Aldrich) for seven days at 28°C.
collect the supernatant of infected cultures.
make aliquots of 500 µl in microtubes containing 20% fetal bovine serum (Cultilab).
